message:
perf: skip every other frame to halve bandwidth

- Set everyNthFrame: 2 in Chrome screencast
- Reduces frames sent over pipe by 50%
- Bump version to 0.8.6

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "termweb",
-  "version": "0.8.5",
+  "version": "0.8.6",
   "description": "Web browser in your terminal using Kitty graphics protocol. SDK for building terminal apps with web technologies.",
   "main": "./lib/index.js",
   "bin": {
